title: Mission and Vision
content:
Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a brain base that understands and heals human beings, making multidimensional and innovative contributions to global and societal development through education and research for the future.

Mission

To educate virtuous people who produce and disseminate science with the principle of excellence in education and research, have a high awareness of environmental and social problems, and serve the society with the principle of sustainability.
